title: Linked Destiny
description:
Change the way you play with your friend.
Everyone will have the same fate live or die,
damage and heal are shared by everyone
body:
# Informations
This project changes the gameplay of multiplayer. Every damage or regenration of health will be applied to everybody on the server. If one player dies, the others will also die.
> It is a fun game to try surviving knowing that at any moment someone could die.
# Installation
You just have to uncompress the file and put it in the datapacks folder of your world or in the minecraft menu of world creation if you use it for LAN
# Technical informations
Don't have different max health, it will desynchronize the death of player who have more than others.
Don't change max health when the datapack is active because it will break intern functionalities.
In general, the base case is that everybody is at 10 heart max in vanilla without command modification, this case works fine.
